heading: North Dakota and South Dakota as contract health service delivery area
label: 1678a North Dakota and South Dakota as contract health service delivery area
notes: Codificationis based on section 192(2) of title I of S. 1790, One Hundred Eleventh Congress, as reported by the Committee on Indian Affairs of the Senate in Dec. 2009, which was enacted into law by .Section 808A of Pub. L. 94–437section 10221(a) of Pub. L. 111–148

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The States of North Dakota and South Dakota shall be designated as a contract health service delivery area by the Service for the purpose of providing contract health care services to members of Indian tribes in the States of North Dakota and South Dakota.

children.heading: Maintenance of services
children.label: b Maintenance of services
children.text: The Service shall not curtail any health care services provided to Indians residing on any reservation, or in any county that has a common boundary with any reservation, in the State of North Dakota or South Dakota if the curtailment is due to the provision of contract services in those States pursuant to the designation of the States as a contract health service delivery area by subsection (a).
